inferredAssumptions: RMD start timing is inferred from birth-year legislation rules; no explicit user-provided override exists.
Ambiguous holdings (TRP_2030, CENTRAL_MANAGED) require proxy asset-class mapping assumptions.
Runway payroll bridge guidance uses an inferred take-home factor (72%) rather than household-specific paycheck net modeling.

Headline math uses broad asset-class mappings; these risks are surfaced for recommendation trust rather than treated as priced Monte Carlo factors: SCHD exposure is mapped to broad equity returns; dividend/factor concentration is not separately priced in the headline simulation. FCNTX is 83.98% of Roth exposure; manager/style concentration affects recommendation trust, not the Monte Carlo success-rate math. MUB in taxable is treated through broad bond/taxable-account mechanics; state/AMT/after-tax muni nuances are recommendation-trust risks. TRP_2030 is modeled through asset-class look-through/proxy mapping; fund-manager glidepath risk is not separately priced. CENTRAL_MANAGED is modeled through asset-class look-through/proxy mapping; manager/security-selection risk is not separately priced.
Inheritance timing and realizable amount remain uncertain even with explicit tax treatment.
Home downsizing is explicitly modeled, but sale amount/timing/replacement home are marked as estimates.
Plan evaluation context unavailable; model completeness defaulted to reconstructed.
No modeled RMD year was present; used estimated RMD start year 2038.
Ambiguous holding TRP_2030: Target-date 2030 mapped using configured account-level assumption.
Ambiguous holding CENTRAL_MANAGED: Managed sleeve mapped using configured account-level assumption.
No modeled ACA bridge year was available; estimated bridge year as 2027.
Projected bridge-year MAGI was unavailable; defaulted projected MAGI to 0.
Contribution limits use explicit rules.contributionLimits source "planning_estimate_for_2027_final_paycheck_window".
Estimated federal tax savings use a 22% marginal federal rate placeholder.
Contribution settings patch uses annualized payroll targets; in-year effect is prorated by salary timing.
Autopilot yearly flow data was unavailable; retirement flow rows defaulted to zero values.
Plan evaluation context unavailable; model completeness defaulted to reconstructed.
No modeled RMD year was present; used estimated RMD start year 2038.
Ambiguous holding TRP_2030: Target-date 2030 mapped using configured account-level assumption.
Ambiguous holding CENTRAL_MANAGED: Managed sleeve mapped using configured account-level assumption.
No modeled ACA bridge year was available; estimated bridge year as 2027.
Projected bridge-year MAGI was unavailable; defaulted projected MAGI to 0.
Contribution limits use explicit rules.contributionLimits source "planning_estimate_for_2027_final_paycheck_window".
Estimated federal tax savings use a 22% marginal federal rate placeholder.
Contribution settings patch uses annualized payroll targets; in-year effect is prorated by salary timing.
Autopilot yearly flow data was unavailable; retirement flow rows defaulted to zero values.

notes: Deterministic audit isolates LTC/HSA mechanics from market returns, taxes, and healthcare premiums.
Monte Carlo aggregates use the actual simulated yearly path, including failures before later LTC years.

checks.detail: Export and north-star result were generated in the same run.
North-star result fingerprint matches the exported effective inputs.
Both raw and planner-enhanced simulation modes are labeled for replay.
Replay has deterministic seed and trial count metadata.
North-star result uses the active current-law rule pack.
